Description of the transaction - Optional
Effective Date of the record - Mandatory
Prefix code of the system transaction; empty string means no prefix code but in use; NULL means not in use, obsoleted - Optional

Internal value.

Item Height (applies only to form items).
Item Width (applies only to form items).
